rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ADA C. UNRUH FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of David Hillbrand, Executor Of The Will Of William James Shiloh Unruh, Deceased, To Petition For Instructions Filed By Marjory Halligan Ccp 430.10
rulings.Rulings: Executor David Hillbrand's Demurrer to Petition for Instructions is sustained without leave amend, on the basis of the applicable statutes of limitations, Probate Code § 16460(a)(2) and CCP § 338, and lack of standing under Probate Code § 17200. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, May 24, 2017.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ADA C. UNRUH FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Determining Marjory Halligan To Be A Vexatious Litigan
rulings.Rulings: Executor David Hillbrand's Motion for Order Determining Marjory Halligan to be a Vexatious Litigant is granted. Petitioner meets the statutory definition of a vexatious litigant under both CCP § 391(b)(2) and CCP § 391(b)(3). The Court will enter a pre-filing order pursuant to CCP § 391.7(a). Executor's motion that Petitioner be required to post a security bond pursuant to CCP § 391.3 is denied without prejudice. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, May 24, 2017.
